mapper.select: SELECT i.name, i.type, i.item_num,p.process_num, p.flow, p.head_count, p.process_status, i.item_status, TO_CHAR(p.created_at, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS created_at FROM process p JOIN item i ON p.item_num = i.item_num WHERE i.TYPE IN ('PRODUCT', 'SEMIPRODUCT') ORDER BY p.process_num DESC

SELECT i.name, i.type, i.item_num, p.flow, p.head_count, p.process_status, i.item_status, TO_CHAR(p.created_at, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS created_at FROM process p JOIN item i ON p.item_num = i.item_num
AND upper(i.type) = 'PRODUCT'
AND upper(i.type) = 'SEMIPRODUCT'
AND upper(i.name) LIKE ('%' || upper(#{keyword}) || '%')
AND upper(p.process_status) = '사용중'
AND upper(p.process_status) = '미사용'
ORDER BY i.item_num DESC
SELECT i.CODE, i.NAME, i.TYPE, i.UNIT, i.ITEM_NUM FROM item i WHERE UPPER(NAME) LIKE '%' || UPPER(#{_parameter}) || '%' AND i.TYPE IN ('PRODUCT', 'SEMIPRODUCT')
mapper.insert:
SELECT PROCESS_SEQ.NEXTVAL FROM DUAL
INSERT INTO PROCESS ( process_num, process_content, flow, image, item_num, process_code, process_status, created_at, head_count ) VALUES ( #{id}, #{process_content}, #{flow}, #{savedFileName}, #{item_num}, 'CODE_' || #{id}, '사용중', sysdate, #{head_count} )
mapper.select: SELECT i.item_num, i.code, i.name, i.type, i.unit, i.item_status, p.process_status, p.flow, p.image, p.process_content, p.process_num, p.head_count, TO_CHAR(p.created_at, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS created_at FROM process p JOIN item i ON p.item_num = i.item_num where p.process_num = #{itemNum}
